post.description:
This endpoint registers a new user in the system using name, email, and password.
If the registration is successful, the API returns the created user and a Bearer token for authentication.

email: The email has already been taken.

post.description:
Authenticates a user using email and password.
If the credentials are valid, the API returns the authenticated user and a Bearer token used for accessing protected routes.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's information.
This endpoint requires a valid Bearer token.

post.description:
Logs out the authenticated user by deleting the current access token.
After logout, the token can no longer be used to access protected routes.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's information.
This endpoint requires a valid Bearer token.

post.description: Creates a new category in the system.

get.description: Returns a list of all categories available in the system.
Returns a single category by its ID.

put.description:
Updates the category identified by the provided ID with new name and/or description.
Requires a valid Bearer token.

delete.description:
Deletes the category with the specified ID.
Requires a valid Bearer token.

post.description:
Creates a new dish (plat) directly inside a specific category by its ID.
This endpoint requires a valid Bearer Token for authentication (Sanctum).
Creates a new dish in the restaurant menu and associates it with a category. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all dishes with their category info.
Retrieves details of a specific dish by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing dish. Only the authenticated owner (admin) can perform this. Authorization enforced via Policy.

delete.description: Deletes a dish by ID, only if the admin who created it is authorized.

post.description: Create a new ingredient with nutritional tags.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all ingredients with their nutritional tags.

put.description: Update an existing ingredient's name and nutritional tags.

delete.description: Remove an ingredient from the system permanently. Only accessible by admin.

post.description: Lancer l'analyse de compatibilité nutritionnelle d'un plat pour l'utilisateur connecté.

get.description: Récupère l’historique de toutes les recommandations de l’utilisateur.

Fournit une vue globale des plats et recommandations pour l’administrateur.
Retourne des statistiques telles que le nombre total de plats, le nombre de recommandations par statut, et des scores moyens.
